description: Horizontal chip row for displaying attached files with type icons and remove buttons
testIds: FileChipList renders nothing when files array is empty
FileChipList renders a chip for each file
FileChipList shows thumbnail img for image files with previewUrl
FileChipList does not show img element for non-image files
FileChipList calls onRemove with correct index when × is clicked
FileChipList remove buttons have accessible aria-label
FileChipList chip list has accessible role and label
